Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Lorentzen Co.
Off Calendar Jan-28-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Lorentzen Co.
Dept: 514. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Jason Woods, Esq. appeared for plaintiff John Woods, who was not present for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Lorentzen Co.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Personal Injury-Asbestos was filed on August 16, 2017.
Summons, Complaint and Statement of Damages were personally served on defendant Lorentzen Co.'s Authorized Agent for Service of Process on September 7, 2017.
Default as to defendant Lorentzen Co. was entered on November 13, 2017.
Statement of Damages was filed on November 13, 2017.
DOES 1 through 250, and DOES 252 through 800, were dismissed on November 13, 2019. (Order substituting Shell Oil Company for DOE Number 251 was filed on February 8, 2018).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff John Woods, and against the defaulted defendant Lorentzen Co., as follows:

Economic Damages - $97,750.00.
Non-Economic Damages - $750,000.00
Total - $847,750.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
